pi_items.source: setup_task.sh creates template file at this exact path using cat heredoc
export_result.sh checks for PDF at this path; path is referenced in verifier.py
setup_task.sh comment and merchandising_strategy.txt both specify 72-inch height. Template XML confirms 720px = 72 inches at 10px/inch scale
setup_task.sh, merchandising_strategy.txt, and template XML all confirm 1 inch = 10 pixels. Template: 480px width = 48", 720px height = 72"
setup_task.sh product_list.csv SKU 101: FiberCrunch
setup_task.sh product_list.csv SKU 101: FiberCrunch is Adult category
setup_task.sh product_list.csv SKU 101: FiberCrunch has High margin ($2.50)
setup_task.sh product_list.csv SKU 101: FiberCrunch height is 12 inches
Adults items go to eye level per merchandising strategy. Task description confirms high-margin items at eye level
setup_task.sh product_list.csv SKU 102: ChocoBlast
setup_task.sh product_list.csv SKU 102: ChocoBlast is Kids category
setup_task.sh product_list.csv SKU 102: ChocoBlast has Medium margin ($1.20)
setup_task.sh product_list.csv SKU 102: ChocoBlast height is 10 inches
Kids items go to bottom shelf per merchandising strategy (0-20" from bottom). Task description confirms Kids items on bottom
setup_task.sh product_list.csv SKU 103: SugarDust
setup_task.sh product_list.csv SKU 103: SugarDust is Kids category
setup_task.sh product_list.csv SKU 103: SugarDust has Low margin ($0.80). Merchandising strategy lists SugarDust as candidate for SALE tag (lowest margin product)
setup_task.sh product_list.csv SKU 103: SugarDust height is 10 inches
Kids items go to bottom shelf per merchandising strategy
setup_task.sh product_list.csv SKU 104: HeartyOats
setup_task.sh product_list.csv SKU 104: HeartyOats is Adult category
setup_task.sh product_list.csv SKU 104: HeartyOats has High margin ($2.10)
setup_task.sh product_list.csv SKU 104: HeartyOats height is 11 inches
Adults/high-margin items go to eye level per merchandising strategy
setup_task.sh product_list.csv SKU 105: BudgetBag
setup_task.sh product_list.csv SKU 105: BudgetBag is Value category
setup_task.sh product_list.csv SKU 105: BudgetBag has Low margin ($0.50). This is the LOWEST margin product. Merchandising strategy mentions BudgetBag as candidate for SALE tag
setup_task.sh product_list.csv SKU 105: BudgetBag height is 14 inches
Value items go to top shelf per merchandising strategy (above 60" from bottom)
install_drawio.sh downloads version 26.0.9 from GitHub release. GitHub confirms release exists: https://github.com/jgraph/drawio-desktop/releases/tag/v26.0.9

pi_items.metadata_value: approx 50-60 inches from bottom (from task description)
pi_items.verified_value: 45-60 inches from bottom (from merchandising_strategy.txt in setup_task.sh)
pi_items.source: DISCREPANCY: task.json description step 5 says 'approx 50-60 inches from bottom' but merchandising_strategy.txt section 2 clearly states 'EYE LEVEL (45" - 60" from bottom)'
Both task description and merchandising_strategy.txt agree on this zone

pi_items.metadata_value: Not explicitly in metadata, but verifier expects minimum 11 total product shapes
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh product_list.csv specifies: FiberCrunch(2), ChocoBlast(3), SugarDust(3), HeartyOats(2), BudgetBag(1) = 11 total minimum facings

pi_items.verified_value: BudgetBag ($0.50) is the absolute lowest margin
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh product_list.csv: BudgetBag=$0.50 vs SugarDust=$0.80. Merchandising strategy mentions 'BudgetBag or SugarDust'

privileged_info_summary: All product data is synthetic, generated by setup_task.sh. The task involves creating a retail planogram for a cereal aisle using Diagrams.net v26.0.9. Fixture: 48"W × 72"H (480×720px at 10px/inch scale). Five products: FiberCrunch & HeartyOats (Adult, High margin) target eye level; ChocoBlast & SugarDust (Kids) target bottom shelf; BudgetBag (Value, lowest $0.50 margin) targets top shelf. Minimum 11 product facings required. DISCREPANCY FOUND: Task description claims eye level is 'approx 50-60 inches' but merchandising strategy states '45-60 inches from bottom'.
